channel.title: _apeflex TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from _apeflex

item.title: Buying an older, carbureted bike? Here’s a quick easy way to diagnose the engine before you can strip it down Check the spark plugs - Color, deposits, and wear tell you if your bike is running rich, lean, hot, or healthy. Light tan = happy. Black = rich
item.description: Buying an older, carbureted bike? Here’s a quick easy way to diagnose the engine before you can strip it down Check the spark plugs - Color, deposits, and wear tell you if your bike is running rich, lean, hot, or healthy. Light tan = happy. Black = rich
item.author: _apeflex

item.title: Riding isn’t just about the road - it’s about the space it creates and the people who understand it. GEICO Motorcycle gives you peace of mind from the first mile, so you can focus on the moments that bring you back to yourself. It feels good to know you’r

item.author: _apeflex
